title: Notes & Update
markdown:
Went to Ohio. Killed a raccoon on the way. Thought up a good idea for a charity: Defenders of Raccoons. Give them $20 and they will save the life of a raccoon, so you can offset the one you ran over.


Son is doing summer camp at a farm right now.


Latest exciting project is trying to make a Halo map. I’ll probably start out with a modest map, like recreating my apartment.
